issue_title: Simple "Whitespace only" compression removing "each" keyword from "for each (var x in arr)" loop

com.google.javascript.jscomp.parsing.Par.src:
public void testForEach() {

    parseError(

        "function f(stamp, status) {\n" +

        "  for each ( var curTiming in this.timeLog.timings ) {\n" +

        "    if ( curTiming.callId == stamp ) {\n" +

        "      curTiming.flag = status;\n" +

        "      break;\n" +

        "    }\n" +

        "  }\n" +

        "};",

        "unsupported language extension: for each");

  }
